center.name: 皮特基亞蘭塔區
center.summary: 皮特基亞蘭塔區是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括烏鵰，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: They are found across much of Central Russia, with their probable northern limits being in Shuryshkarsky and Pitkyarantsky Districts

links.evidence: They are found across much of Central Russia, with their probable northern limits being in Shuryshkarsky and Pitkyarantsky Districts
